![Keymaps](../.config/nvim/lua/config/keymaps.png)

# Keymaps

| Hotkey    | Mode   | Description                             |
| --------- | ------ | --------------------------------------- |
| `,sff`    | n      | Find Files                              |
| `,sfi`    | n      | Find Files (All)                        |
| `,sfb`    | n      | Buffer Files                            |
| `,sfr`    | n      | Recent Files                            |
| `,sfc`    | n      | Config Files                            |
| --------- | ------ | --------------------------------------- |
| `,sgg`    | n      | Live Grep                               |
| `,sgi`    | n      | Live Grep (All Files)                   |
| `,sgw`    | n,v    | Live Grep Word (All Files)              |
| --------- | ------ | --------------------------------------- |
| `,ud`     | n      | Toggle Diagnostic                       |
| `,uf`     | n      | Toggle Autoformat                       |
| --------- | ------ | --------------------------------------- |
| `,gs`     | n      | Git Stage Flow                          |
| `,gh`     | n,v    | Git File History                        |
| `,gd`     | n      | Git Diff Open                           |
| --------- | ------ | --------------------------------------- |
| `:ju`     | c      | Show jump list                          |
| `<C-o>`   | n      | Jump to previous position in jumplist   |
| `<C-i>`   | n      | Jump to next position in jumplist       |
| --------- | ------ | --------------------------------------- |
| `<C-f>`   | c      | Command history window                  |
| --------- | ------ | --------------------------------------- |
| `gc`      | v      | Toggle comment                          |
| --------- | ------ | --------------------------------------- |
| `K`       | n      | Documentation (Hover)                   |
| --------- | ------ | --------------------------------------- |
| `grr`     | n      | Show references                         |
| `grt`     | n      | Go to type definition                   |
| `grn`     | n      | Rename                                  |
| `gra`     | n,v    | Code Action                             |
| `<C-s>`   | i      | Signature help                          |
| --------- | ------ | --------------------------------------- |
